## Definition of Done check

- [ ] Audio take committed that demonstrates the claim
- [ ] `NOTES.md` updated for affected tracks
- [ ] At least one journal entry since last merge
- [ ] No unapproved new tools/apps introduced this phase
- [ ] I could reproduce this live tomorrow (be honest)
